items.title_en: The first half of 2026 has been strong. Why investors should expect more upside

items.desc_en: Don't expect the stock market's momentum in first six months of 2026 to wane in the back half of the year, according to CFRA.
items.desc_zh: CFRA 表示，预计 2026 年前六个月股市的势头不会在今年下半年减弱。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes

items.title_en: Five dead following shooting at youth centre in Stade, northern Germany

items.desc_zh: 警方称，两人已被捕，其中一人是嫌疑人。

items.desc_en: Martin Marietta Materials said on Monday it would merge with limestone supplier Lhoist North America in a cash-and-stock deal worth $13.5 billion.
items.desc_zh: Martin Marietta Materials 周一表示，将与石灰石供应商 Lhoist North America 合并，以现金加股票的方式进行价值 135 亿美元的交易。

items.title_en: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them

items.desc_en: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

items.title_en: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
items.title_zh: 如果你认为中国需要推翻美元，那你就不明白它是如何发动全球货币战争的
items.desc_en: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.
